name: Snatch 'N Run

abilities.name: Bayou Two Card
abilities.text: Once per activation. During actions this model declared, it may cheat fate with the top card of its fate deck. If it does so, it must declare triggers if able.

actions.name: Seize the Opportunity
actions.effects: Target an enemy marker. Place this model in base contact with the target. If the target is a Scheme marker, this model gains an Impact token. Then, remove the target.

extraction_notes: Crew card includes a deployment zone ability: 'During the start phase of turn 1, this crew may summon up to three Bayou Gremlins within 6" of its deployment zone.'
The (c) suit for 'Good Haul' trigger is inferred from the bullet point icon style used in Malifaux cards
